channel.description: Latest marine jobs for Engine Ratings
channel.title: Maritime Union - Job for Mariners

item.description:
Location: Maldives
Description:

A Wiper position is available on a Tug Boat for immediate joining. The role requires 1 sail experience and an Indian Watchkeeping (IND WKP) certificate. The salary offered is USD 400. This is a permanent company position with a stable career opportunity. Limited vacancies are available.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Wiper Job on Tug Boat - Immediate Joining USD 400 at SEAAXIS MARITIME

item.description:
Location: Henderson, Perth WA
Description:

A Mechanical Fitter position is available for work on marine mechanical installation and vessel construction projects in Henderson, Perth WA. Candidates should possess experience in mechanical fitting, shipbuilding, or heavy industry. This role is within the growing WA Defence and Marine Industry, focusing on major projects and complex mechanical works.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Mechanical Fitter Job in Henderson, Perth WA at Legeneering

item.description:
Location: Worldwide
Description:

A Motorman (MTM) or Oiler position is available on an Oil/Chemical Tanker operating worldwide. This role is based with the team in the Philippines. Key responsibilities include assisting engineers with maintenance and operations onboard.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Motorman / Oiler Job on Oil/Chemical Tanker at OSM Thome Jobs at Sea

item.description:
Location:
Description:

A Fitter/Welder is needed for mechanical repairs and fabrication tasks onboard.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Fitter/Welder Vacancy at Franco Compania Naviera S.A.

item.description:
Location:
Description:

An Oiler is needed to assist with the maintenance and lubrication of engine room machinery.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Oiler Vacancy at Franco Compania Naviera S.A.

item.description:
Location:
Description:

A Wiper position is available to support the engine department with cleaning and basic maintenance tasks.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Wiper Vacancy at Franco Compania Naviera S.A.

item.description:
Location: Hamburg
Description:

An apprenticeship as a Ship Mechanic (M/F/D) is available in Hamburg. This full-time, onsite position offers a career start within a leading maritime solutions provider. The role is based in Hamburg.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Ship Mechanic Apprenticeship - Hamburg at Fairplay Schleppdampfschiffs-Reederei Richard Borchard GmbH

item.description:
Location: Piraeus, Greece or Misurata, Libya
Description:

Qualified Oilers and Fitters are urgently sought to join a Container Vessel. The position offers a salary of USD 1,100/month for Oilers and USD 1,500/month for Fitters. Joining is expected within one week in Piraeus, Greece, or Misurata, Libya. Applicants must possess a Panama Seaman's Passport and relevant experience. All nationalities are welcome.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Oiler and Fitter Jobs on Container Vessel at VNW Marine Services (Vanguard Next Wave)

item.description:
Location:
Description:

Experienced Plumbers are sought to join the Engine Department aboard a cruise ship. This role offers the chance to become part of an international team at sea. Key requirements include relevant experience in plumbing and a willingness to work within a dynamic maritime environment.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Plumber Job on Cruise Ship at World of Seamen Group

item.description:
Location: North Coast of Scotland
Description:

A Motorman position is available on a permanent basis for a leading Scottish ferry operator. This role offers a 2 weeks on / 2 weeks off rotation and is based on the North Coast of Scotland. Essential requirements include an EWR Certificate, valid ENG1 Medical Certificate, and relevant STCW certification. Previous passenger vessel experience is desirable. A competitive salary package, workplace pension, and health benefits are provided.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Motorman Job on Ferry - Permanent Position at Clyde Marine Recruitment
